title: Designed for the way you work today
paragraphs: VR is a collection defined by a simple, geometric form that offers broad possibilities for arranging a workspace. Its classic design, ergonomic approach, and strong functionality make everyday work more comfortable and organized.
The minimalist construction also works well in shared offices and open-space environments, creating comfortable conditions even for the most demanding users.
packshotImageAlt: VR desk system product shot – L-shaped oak desktop with black steel frame on white background

features.title: Modular Design
features.desc: Infinitely configurable to fit any workspace layout

features.title: Height Adjustable
features.desc: Electric sit-stand mechanism with memory presets

features.title: 10-Year Warranty
features.desc: Built to last with premium materials and craftsmanship
